URL: https://github.com/TibixDev/winboat
Language: typescript
Run Windows apps on 🐧 Linux with ✨ seamless integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/page-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent
Language: typescript
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: blackboardsh/electrobun
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/blackboardsh/electrobun
Language: typescript
Build ultra fast, tiny, and cross-platform desktop apps with Typescript.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iii-hq/iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iii-hq/iii
Language: typescript
iii (pronounced “three eye”) unifies your existing backend stack with a single engine and three primitives: Function, Worker, and Trigger.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/openai-cua-sample-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-cua-sample-app
Language: typescript
Learn how to use CUA (our Computer Using Agent) via the API on multiple computer environments.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/openclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
Language: typescript
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shadcn-ui/ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui
Language: typescript
A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
Language: typescript
Bash is all you need - A nano Claude Code–like agent, built from 0 to 1

ns0:entry.ns0:title: toeverything/AFFiNE
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/toeverything/AFFiNE
Language: typescript
There can be more than Notion and Miro. AFFiNE(pronounced [ə‘fain]) is a next-gen knowledge base that brings planning, sorting and creating all together. Privacy first, open-source, customizable and ready to use.
